question: Who is the current Secretary-General of the United Nations?
reference_answer: António Guterres is the Secretary-General of the United Nations.

reference_contexts.content: The Secretary-General of the United Nations is António Guterres, who assumed office on 1 January 2017.
António Guterres serves as the ninth Secretary-General of the United Nations.
António Guterres, Portuguese politician and diplomat, has been UN Secretary-General since 2017.
